---
title: "Statistical Modelling"
author: "Exam Number: B261807"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```


```{r libraries}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)


```

```{r data}

data <- read_csv(here("data/respiratory_synthetic_assignment.csv"))

data %>% str()
data %>% glimpse()

summary(lm(symptom_change_6m ~ new_therapy, data = data))

ggplot(aes(x = new_therapy, y = symptom_change_6m), data = data) +
  geom_boxplot()

```
